title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. residuum
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. residuum, also known as a rare subspecies of the Hieracium plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium schmidtii subsp. residuum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
